section_name: Permit to Move Oil Well Servicing or Drilling Machinery
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The department may, on application, issue a permit for the movement over a road or highway under the jurisdiction of the Texas Department of Transportation of a vehicle that:

(1) is a piece of fixed-load mobile machinery or equipment used to service, clean out, or drill an oil well; and

(2) cannot comply with the restrictions set out in Subchapter C (Maximum Width) of Chapter 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) and Section 621.101 (Maximum Weight of Vehicle or Combination) .

(b) The department may not issue a permit under this section unless the vehicle may be moved without material damage to the highway or serious inconvenience to highway traffic.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.142 — Permit to Move Oil Well Servicing or Drilling Machinery

(a) The department may, on application, issue a permit for the movement over a road or highway under the jurisdiction of the Texas Department of Transportation of a vehicle that:

    (1) is a piece of fixed-load mobile machinery or equipment used to service, clean out, or drill an oil well; and

    (2) cannot comply with the restrictions set out in Subchapter C (Maximum Width) of Chapter 621 (General Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size and Weight) and Section 621.101 (Maximum Weight of Vehicle or Combination) .

(b) The department may not issue a permit under this section unless the vehicle may be moved without material damage to the highway or serious inconvenience to highway traffic.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 85, eff. September 1, 2011.*
